welcome.greeting: Hello! I'm Eve, your leadership coach. I'm here to help you grow as a leader, manage stress, and build stronger teams.
welcome.prompt: What would you like to explore today?

starters.leadership: I want to work on my leadership skills
starters.team: I need help with my team
starters.conversation: I have a challenging conversation coming up
starters.stress: My stress has been building up

input.hint: Your conversations are private and confidential

clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear your conversation history?

quickReplies.tryExercise: I'd like to try an exercise

crisis.message:
Thank you for trusting me with this. What you're sharing is important, and your well-being matters above all else.

I'm Eve, a leadership coach, and what you're describing needs support from someone qualified to help with this specific situation.

Please reach out to:
- Emergency services: 112 (EU) / 911 (US)
- Crisis support: Contact your local crisis hotline
- Your organization's Employee Assistance Program (EAP) if available
- A trusted colleague, friend, or family member

You don't have to face this alone. Please seek support now.

I'll be here when you're ready to continue our leadership conversations.

errors.sendFailed: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
